main.description: List the notifications the calling app has sent to a user, newest-first, including read state and how many channels each was delivered to. Dual-authenticated like setRouting (app JWT in the Authorization header + a user-issued `userToken`); it is a procedure, not a query, so the user token travels in the body. Returns only the calling app's own notifications. Requires an active grant from the user to the app.

userToken.description: A user-issued atproto service-auth JWT (com.atproto.server.getServiceAuth) with aud = the relay's DID and lxm = pub.atmo.notify.listNotifications.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
Present when more notifications may be available.

read.description: Whether the user has marked this notification read (in any client).

delivered.description: Number of channels (push/Telegram targets) this notification fanned out to. 0 means it was recorded to the inbox but no alert channel fired (e.g. muted, routed off, or no channels).
